headline: Delta earnings: Jet fuel spike has helped airlines pass on higher fares
summary: Delta Air Lines (DAL) stock continues to face some turbulence ahead of Friday's close despite flying past second quarter estimates with the operator reporting revenue of $17.67 billion and adjusted earnings of $1.56 per share. The airline cited struggles with elevated jet fuel prices while boasting strong demand. Raymond James managing director Savi Syth discusses her recent downgrade on the stock.

headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Rises; SK Hynix Pops In U.S. Trading Debut; WD-40 Glides Higher (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and S&P 500 improved upon slight gains Friday afternoon, while South Korean memory-chip maker SK Hynix (SKHY) rocketed higher as its shares began trading on Wall Street.  WD-40 gapped up after its earnings report, while Delta Air Lines retreated on the stock market today.  SK Hynix stock priced late Thursday at 149, and opened at 170 when trading began Friday morning.

headline: SK Hynix, Micron, Meta, Delta, Circle Internet, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
summary: Stocks were rising slightly Friday and many technology shares were taking a breather as  SK Hynix  made its U.S. trading debut.  American depositary receipts of  SK Hynix   began trading at $170 on the Nasdaq and at last check were at $175.26, up 18% from the initial public offering price of $149.  The South Korean memory chip maker is issuing 177.9 million ADRs, with 10 ADRs representing one common share.

headline: What Delta’s report tells investors in American and United
summary: For investors holding UAL and AAL, Delta's Q2 is more than a scorecard for one carrier — it is the sector's first detailed read on whether premium fare pricing can absorb record fuel costs, how loyalty programs are holding up, and whether consumer travel demand has crested. The tip-offs from Atlanta are largely encouraging.
